clarity.notes: The board stays dominant at rest, dependencies live in the sidebar disclosure, and the selected-work rail only appears after a work card is selected.

hierarchy.notes: The Kanban board remains the primary surface; selection introduces a draggable separator so the board and right rail visibly trade width without adding dashboard clutter.

typography.notes: Compact Notion-style type is preserved, uppercase labels have tracked spacing, and the polish pass avoided adding explanatory UI copy.

motion.notes: The HTML source has a real pointer and keyboard splitter plus Escape-to-close. The live-artifact registration cannot be refreshed because the preview validator rejects script elements.

brand.notes: The interface keeps the Notion-style warm canvas, whisper borders, muted sidebar navigation, and single blue accent.
